independence: Wave41 uses synchronized four-asset ranking and prior-only residualization. It does not use Wave39/Wave40 candidate ranks, thresholds or outcomes.

data_separation.rule: The exact cross-sectional formula, candidate key, costs, latency, stops and gates are frozen from 2022 before any 2023 PnL is opened.

official_inputs.source: checksum-verified Binance USD-M aggTrades, one-minute klines and funding
official_inputs.decision_clock: completed first 10 seconds after every 15-minute boundary
official_inputs.normalization: trailing 60 calendar days, shifted one boundary, minimum 30 days
official_inputs.residualization: trailing prior-only covariance beta to BTC standardized flow/return; BTC residual is its own standardized value
official_inputs.missing_policy: no imputation; a candidate or still-open path intersecting an absent official minute is invalid

families.mechanism: Select the asset with the largest absolute BTC-residualized flow shock when its first-10-second price accepts that flow; informed asset-specific inventory transfer continues.
Select the asset whose residual flow is large relative to its residual price response; price has not yet incorporated the asset-specific order-flow shock.
Select the asset whose residual price response is large relative to residual flow support; the move is faded after the 10-second clock completes.
After an extreme BTC boundary-flow shock, select the altcoin with the smallest same-direction residual price response while its own flow does not oppose BTC; trade delayed cross-market transmission.
Select the non-BTC asset with the largest residual price move that is unsupported or opposed by its residual flow; trade convergence to the common crypto factor.

execution.entry: first official one-minute open after the complete 10-second decision clock
execution.same_score_tie_break: BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP only after exact floating score tie
execution.intrabar_rule: stop first; adverse open on a gap through the stop
execution.funding: actual historical funding with conservative exact-exit inclusion
execution.selection_notional: 1x equity; no risk or leverage optimization

development_gate.selection_score: minimum fold growth, then 32bp total growth, then lower concentration

forbidden: target daily return as an optimization objective
future MFE/MAE or final trade outcome as entry input
